description: Context awareness protocol defining how defense sensors calibrate to situational context. Awareness levels gate which defense patterns activate.

awareness_levels.name: baseline
awareness_levels.description: Normal operating state. Passive monitoring only.

awareness_levels.name: alert
awareness_levels.description: Confirmed manipulation pattern. Containment protocols armed.

awareness_levels.name: active_defense
awareness_levels.description: Active threat. Full defense engagement. Escalation pathway open.
